title: search_notes
description: Search notes in an Obsidian vault by content, title, tags, frontmatter properties, or folder. Returns matching notes with context snippets.

query.description: Full-text search query across note content and titles

tags.description: Filter by tags (notes must have ALL specified tags)

folder.description: Restrict search to a folder path (e.g. 'Projects/2026')

modified_after.description: Only notes modified after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

modified_before.description: Only notes modified before this date

include_content.description: Include full note content in results (default: snippets only)
